violations.text: Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Food items were placed hot into the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Food items were transferred imediatley onto shallow pans one layer deep. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2023
The hand sink in the deli is lacking a splash guard, a splash guard must be placed to prevent splashing between the handsink and prep table. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the produce case have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
The condensate from the produce refrigeration unit is draining onto the floor Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2023

The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The ceiling tiles above the sales floor and in the produce prep area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2023
